config.cacheDirectory.markdownDescriptio:
Current cache directory. This value is maintained by the extension and should not be edited manually.

[Open Cache Directory](command:labview-vi-support.openCacheDirectory) | [Clear Cache](command:labview-vi-support.clearCache)
config.scriptTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds applied to each invocation of the bundled LabVIEW worker pipeline (image export / property read / property write).
